title: iria monandra
intro: Iria monandra, also known as the Yellow Hibiscus, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Iria monandra include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and relieving respiratory issues. Iria monandra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
